info.title: SDP - Service Desk
info.description: Work with ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus On-Premises requests, changes, problems, solutions, notes, worklogs, tasks, and resolutions, plus admin lookups for dropdowns. Auth: technician API key in the 'authtoken' header. Every parameter is wrapped in a single 'input_data' JSON envelope per the SDP V3 API contract.

get.description: Lists service desk requests with pagination, sorting, and search criteria.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists service desk requests with pagination, sorting, and search criteria. Uses the list_info envelope.

post.description: Creates a new service desk request. Only subject is required.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Creates a new service desk request. Only subject is required. Example: {"request":{"subject":"Printer down","requester":{"email_id":"user@company.com"},"priority":{"name":"High"}}}

get.description: Gets the full details of a single service desk request by its ID.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

put.description: Updates an existing request; only provided fields change.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Updates an existing request; only provided fields change. Example: {"request":{"priority":{"name":"High"},"status":{"name":"In Progress"}}}

delete.description: Moves a request to the trash (destructive).

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

put.description: Closes a request with optional closure details. Mandatory fields and workflow status transitions may be required first.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Closure envelope. Example: {"request":{"closure_info":{"closure_comments":"Resolved","closure_code":{"name":"Success"}}}}

get.description: Lists notes attached to a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Optional input_data envelope as a JSON string.

post.description: Adds a note to a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Adds a note to a request. Example: {"note":{"description":"Called the user","show_to_requester":false}}

get.description: Lists worklogs (time entries) for a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Optional input_data envelope as a JSON string.

post.description: Adds a worklog (time entry) to a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Adds a worklog (time entry) to a request. Example: {"worklog":{"description":"Investigated the issue","owner":{"email_id":"tech@company.com"}}}

get.description: Lists tasks associated with a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Optional input_data envelope as a JSON string.

get.description: Gets the resolution of a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

post.description: Adds/sets the resolution of a request.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: Request ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Adds/sets the resolution of a request. Example: {"resolution":{"content":"Replaced the toner cartridge."}}

get.description: Lists change requests with pagination and search criteria.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists change requests with pagination and search criteria. Uses the list_info envelope.

post.description: Creates a new change. title is required.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Creates a new change. title is required. Example: {"change":{"title":"Upgrade DB server","change_type":{"name":"Normal"}}}

get.description: Gets full details of a single change by its ID.

parameters.name: change_id
parameters.description: Change ID.

put.description: Updates an existing change; only provided fields change.

parameters.name: change_id
parameters.description: Change ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Updates an existing change; only provided fields change. Example: {"change":{"stage":{"name":"Implementation"}}}

get.description: Lists problems with pagination and search criteria.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists problems with pagination and search criteria. Uses the list_info envelope.

post.description: Creates a new problem. title is required.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Creates a new problem. title is required. Example: {"problem":{"title":"Recurring VPN drops"}}

get.description: Gets full details of a single problem by its ID.

parameters.name: problem_id
parameters.description: Problem ID.

put.description: Updates an existing problem; only provided fields change.

parameters.name: problem_id
parameters.description: Problem ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Updates an existing problem; only provided fields change. Example: {"problem":{"status":{"name":"Closed"}}}

get.description: Lists knowledge base / solution articles.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists knowledge base / solution articles. Uses the list_info envelope.

post.description: Creates a new solution article. title is required.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Creates a new solution article. title is required. Example: {"solution":{"title":"How to reset VPN","description":"Steps...","topic":{"name":"Network"}}}

get.description: Gets a single solution article by its ID.

parameters.name: solution_id
parameters.description: Solution ID.

put.description: Updates an existing solution article; only provided fields change.

parameters.name: solution_id
parameters.description: Solution ID.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Updates an existing solution article; only provided fields change. Example: {"solution":{"is_public":true}}

get.description: Lists technicians. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists technicians. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists requesters / end users (the /users module; some builds use /requesters). Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists requesters / end users (the /users module; some builds use /requesters). Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists request categories. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists request categories. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists request statuses. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists request statuses. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists priority levels. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists priority levels. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists sites (locations). Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists sites (locations). Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists technician/support groups (the /support_groups module; some builds use /groups). Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists technician/support groups (the /support_groups module; some builds use /groups). Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists departments. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists departments. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists urgency levels. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists urgency levels. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists impact levels. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists impact levels. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists request submission modes. Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists request submission modes. Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

get.description: Lists request types (e.g. Incident, Service Request). Intended as a dropdown source.

parameters.name: input_data
parameters.description: Lists request types (e.g. Incident, Service Request). Intended as a dropdown source. Uses the list_info envelope.

AcceptHeader.name: Accept
AcceptHeader.description: SDP V3 media type; leave the default.

ResponseStatus.description: SDP status envelope (object or array by build); success has status_code 2000.
